  "findings": [
    "Harness impact indicator tag is deployed, indicating the equipment has been subjected to a fall or severe loading event."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately remove the harness from service.",
    "Tag the harness as 'Do Not Use' and destroy or discard it to prevent accidental reuse.",
    "Issue a compliant, inspected replacement harness to the worker."
  ],
  "rationale": "A deployed impact indicator on a full-body harness indicates that the equipment has arrested a fall or been subjected to equivalent force. Under OSHA standards, any personal fall arrest system component subjected to in-service loading must be immediately removed from service and not used again for employee protection.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926.502(d)(19)",
    "OSHA 1910.140(c)(17)"
  ]
